document.document_description: An invoice is a financial document issued by a seller to a buyer, outlining products or services provided, quantities, prices, and payment terms. It serves as a request for payment in a sales transaction.

fields.name: invoice_date
fields.description: the invoice creation or issue date.
fields.extraction_instructions: This number is typically on the top left corner of the document

fields.name: invoice_id
fields.description: unique identifier, reference number, or invoice number.

fields.name: customer_name
fields.description: Full name of the person or company being billed.
fields.extraction_instructions: This name may be found as part of the address

fields.name: customer_billing_address
fields.description: Complete billing address. This is where bills and invoices are sent.
fields.extraction_instructions: This name may be found as part of the address

fields.name: currency
fields.description: The currency used in the invoice.

fields.name: currency_sign
fields.description: The currency sign of the currency used in the invoice.

fields.name: line_items
fields.description: Information about each product or service listed in the invoice.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: The total amount for the line item.

fields.name: product_code
fields.description: Any product code, SKU, or identifier for the item.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of units purchased of the item.

target_tables.name: Invoice
target_tables.description: An invoice is a financial document issued by a seller to a buyer, outlining products or services provided, quantities, prices, and payment terms. It serves as a request for payment in a sales transaction.

columns.name: invoice_id
columns.description: unique identifier, reference number, or invoice number.

columns.name: invoice_date
columns.description: the invoice creation or issue date.

columns.name: amount
columns.description: The total amount for the line item.

columns.name: product_code

columns.name: constant_column
columns.description: An example of a column to contain always the same constant literal value.
